response.step_by_step_log: Analyzed the video for vocal music. The video contains background electronic music and character dialogue throughout. No vocal songs (songs with singing) were detected in the clip. The text 'SHOCKIN BIBOO' in the top right corner appears to be a thematic tag for the event/song 'ROCK IN!', but no vocal performance of any song occurs during the provided video segment. As no vocal songs were detected, no lyric search was performed.
response.global_summary: An introduction and performance segment for a virtual 3D concert featuring Koseki Bijou. The video contains background electronic music and character dialogue but no vocal song performances.

scenes.description: Introductory graphic for Koseki Bijou's 3D live event. Background electronic music plays.
